roa.docketEntryComment: APP/ORDER REL EXHBTS-PPL'S EXHBTS REL TO INSP TIMOTHY LOUIE 091714
SIGNED BLANKET APP & ORDER RE; DISPOSAL OF EXHIBITS FILED

INFO IS AMENDED TO REFLECT CORRECTIONS AS FOLL-667/1192,7-3/5/85 DELETED23RD DAY OF FEB 1983 IS INSERTED & WORD PENAL IS CORRECTEDASTO ALLEG PR CONV 667,5(B)PC THE 1/22/86 DEL & 26TH NOV IS INSERTEDCRT FND PR ALLEGS 667/1192,7PC & 667,5(B)PC TO BE TRUE;REF APD FOR PSRCONT 10/14/93 AT 9AM IN S26 FOR SENT
/THE COURT ORDERS THE REMITTITUR SPREAD UPON THE MINUTES,//THE JUDGMENT IS AFFIRMED,/

CONT 9/21/93 AT 9AM IN S26 FOR JURY TRIAL
CONT 9/20/93 AT 1030AM IN S26 FOR JURY TRIAL
CONT 9/15/93 AT 9AM IN S26 FOR JURY TRIAL
TRANSF TO D26 FOR TRIAL F/W
PD APPTD;ARR;NG PLEA&DEN ALL ALEGS ENT;9/13/93 TRL 9:30M&8/12/93 PTC10:30
